title: Adventures Plus - ADVS PLUS
description: A vastly improved Minecraft experience, with a focus on adventure but something for everyone—whether you're into redstone, building, or exploration, this modpack has you covered!
body:
![ADVENTURES PLUS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc8721edf6bf4eb557a0812dfff9324265a22f4.png)

# **What is it?**

Well... a modpack, obviously. But one that is just **_better_**—one that enhances every **aspect** of Minecraft for every type of **player**. Are you a **tech nerd** like me? Well, we’ve got the best mods for you, from going to **outer space** to creating the best **Create Mod** farms. But what if you love **building**? Just as you guessed, we’ve handpicked the best mods for you! From the best **furniture mods** to the coolest **blocks there are**! And finally, for all of the **adventurers** out there, just read the title. This modpack is all about **_you_**, giving you the **best biomes**, **compat weapons**, and most importantly, **structures**! But how will you get around this big, big Earth, you may ask? Well, fear not, because we’ve given you all the options you can think of! **Gliding**, **driving**, **sailing**, and even **flying**!

# **Important details**

This modpack is currently in a VERY ALPHA state! You may encounter bugs, and if you do so, please send them to me at _potato_xd_ on Discord! Thank you.  
I use what a lot of people call "weird" settings, which are max FOV and inverted keybinds for LMB and RMB, also for Shift and Ctrl, so please make sure you're comfortable with the settings and modify whatever you need before playing.

# **Who are _we_?**

![P0TAT0 STUDIOS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f8121700107b954163125f54dd4dbd25f45d1d.png)

We are a team called **P0TAT0 STUDIOS** (I know, very creative, thank you). But actually, I lied :( _We_ is just me for now, and I'm Mousa, aka P0TAT0_XD, a very lazy human with nothing to do. But in the future, I’m planning on giving all of **you** way better modpacks, mods, and even resource packs, so I’m definitely going to expand and get some more lazy humans to help me. Hehe. If you want to be a part of **P0TAT0 STUDIOS**, you can contact me at _potato_xd_ on Discord.

I don’t really know what else to say, so I just want to thank you for even considering checking out my modpack. I would love to hear any feedback from you. If you have anything you wish to say to me, I’m always (not really lol) available on Discord. My username is _potato_xd_.

If you want to use this modpack for any public reasons (like a YouTube series), feel free to, but please credit me (P0TAT0_XD) somewhere (optional, but you should still do it hehe).
